strings.Input_GameDirPlaceholder: Select or drop the game / Paks folder
strings.Profile_AesTip: Only for encrypted PAKs you are authorized to access
strings.Profile_LowResourceTip: Limits parallelism and runs child processes at low priority
strings.Steps_KeepGltf: Keep glTF; FBX to a separate copy
strings.Steps_Merge: Merge fragmented models (one glTF per folder)
strings.Steps_MergeTip: UModel exports each model part as a separate glTF; merging reassembles them. Keeps LOD0 only
strings.Steps_DeleteCookedTip: Removes the unpacked cooked files after export, keeping only ExportedAssets / FbxAssets
strings.Safety_Message: The original game folder is never modified. Encryption keys are only passed to local tools and are never written to reports.
strings.Workspace_SummaryEmpty: Pick a game folder and scan for PAKs
strings.Workspace_ShowUnsupportedTip: Unreadable PAKs (e.g. Chromium data packages) are hidden by default
strings.Empty_Hint: Pick a game folder and click "Scan PAKs", or drop a folder onto the window
strings.Empty_FilteredHint: Turn on "Show unsupported" at the top right to see all files
strings.Log_ProfileDetected: UE4 version tag auto-detected from PAK format: {0} (editable).
strings.Log_ProfileAmbiguous: Note: this PAK format (V11) is used by both UE4.26 and UE4.27; ue4.26 was picked. If export fails, switch the tag manually.
strings.Log_ProfileHint: Hint: PAK format suggests {0}; keeping your manual selection.
strings.Log_LowResource: Low impact mode enabled: workers limited to {0}, child processes run at low priority.
strings.Dialog_InvalidPath: Please choose a valid game directory.
strings.Dialog_NoPaks: No .pak files were found in this directory.
strings.Dialog_NoValidPaks: .pak files were found, but none are readable Unreal PAKs. They may be Chromium data packages, IoStore sidecars, or require an AES key.
strings.Dialog_UnsafeOutput: The output directory must be outside the game directory to avoid writing into the original game folder.
strings.Dialog_NoSteps: Please select at least one processing step.
strings.Dialog_DiskSpace:
About {0} is required, but only {1} is free. Continuing may interrupt the task.

Continue anyway?
strings.Dialog_DiskCheckFailed: Could not check the output disk: {0}
strings.Dialog_TaskDone: Processing finished. Details and logs were written to the output directory.
strings.Dialog_CloseWhileBusy: A task is still running. Closing the window will terminate its child processes. Close anyway?
strings.Choose_GameDir: Select the game root or Paks folder
